_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your real values. Do NOT commit config.json with a real token to git/public repos.
offline_redirect_message_template: {user} Please post your question in {ask_poseidon_channel} using the /ask command, or mention Poseidon directly with @
redirect_message_template: {user} It looks like you have a question. Please ask it in {support_channel} so the Mighty Kraken can help you. Messages in {general_channel} may not receive support.
welcome_message_template: {user} just joined {server}! 🎉 Welcome aboard — check out {rules_channel} to get started.
